message:
chore: update Cargo.lock for vendored OpenSSL

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -986,6 +986,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "mime_guess",
  "notify",
  "once_cell",
+ "openssl",
  "ouroboros",
  "parking_lot",
  "pbkdf2",
@@ -4921,6 +4922,15 @@ version = "0.2.1"
 source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
 checksum = "7c87def4c32ab89d880effc9e097653c8da5d6ef28e6b539d313baaacfbafcbe"
 
+[[package]]
+name = "openssl-src"
+version = "300.5.5+3.5.5"
+source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
+checksum = "3f1787d533e03597a7934fd0a765f0d28e94ecc5fb7789f8053b1e699a56f709"
+dependencies = [
+ "cc",
+]
+
 [[package]]
 name = "openssl-sys"
 version = "0.9.111"
@@ -4929,6 +4939,7 @@ checksum = "82cab2d520aa75e3c58898289429321eb788c3106963d0dc886ec7a5f4adc321"
 dependencies = [
  "cc",
  "libc",
+ "openssl-src",
  "pkg-config",
  "vcpkg",
 ]
